title: Skeleton Banging Shield
about: Skeleton Banging Shield or Rahhhhh is an exploitable meme format used in video edits and image macros based on an animation of a skeleton from the RPG The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim yelling and banging on a shield. The skeleton's animation was uploaded online as early as 2014 and paired with the shouting sound effect and banging crowbar sound from Half-Life as early as October 2025, when YouTuber robparx uploaded the meme. It became an increasing subject of memes in December 2025, leading into January 2026.
origin:
The animation of the skeleton banging on the shield originates from The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim. A green-screen compilation of the skeleton's animations, including the shield banging, was uploaded by YouTuber[1] PixelBoom on November 5th, 2014, garnering over 41,699 views in 12 years.

On April 14th, 2022, YouTuber[9] Jordan504 reposted a sound effect, titled "Ignore My Yawn (TikTok Meme) – Original Sound," of a man holding a stone and the roaring, calling it their "yawn" and garnering over 85,000 views in two years.

On August 1st, 2023, YouTuber[2] Hearing Sounds posted the isolated sound effect, titled "RAAAH Sound Effect," of the person roaring, garnering over 103,000 views in two years.

On July 16th, 2023, YouTuber Relljr02 uploaded a video titled "Half life crowbar sound effect," featuring the banging sound later used in the memes, receiving over 88,000 views in two years.

On October 10th, 2025, YouTuber[3] robparx posted a video combining the skeleton shield animation with the roaring sound effect and the banging sound of the crowbar from Half-Life, garnering over 508,000 views in three months.
